title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Taco Bell Ltd
body: "Application number 5356  Applicant Taco Bell Corp. objected to the name used by Taco Bell Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Taco Bell Ltd is changed to SC834927, Ltd. "
